note: Declarative backend registry (C1) — reference/default example. Truth for role→model→connection per agent; NOT a call dispatcher (turn-based agents pick their own model at session start). The dashboard fetches this (relative ./backends.json, configurable) to split the board-worker role out of the generic local group and to render per-agent model badges. verify-nway cross-checks the deployment's registry against its local-keys/. Adopters edit this to declare their own agents; absent file → graceful fallback (board-worker folds back into local, no badges).
